post:
Most people wait for a brilliant AI idea. That's why they never build anything.

I built an attorney joke bot. Here's what it served up this week:

"I got hit with a subpoena yesterday. Man, those things really serve you right."

--
Chuckle score: 2/5. Meh.
--

A 2/5 week is still a shipped week. The bot runs, the joke lands (barely), and I learned more fixing small things than I would've reading another "State of Legal AI" report.

If you haven't built yet, the lesson is simple: your first project doesn't have to be useful. It has to exist.

What's the dumbest useful thing you could automate this weekend?

#LegalTech #LawyerHumor #AttorneyLife #LegalEngineering

I built an attorney joke bot. Here's what it served up this week:

During discovery, opposing counsel asked if I had any hidden documents. I said, "I'm an open book — just not a casebook."

---

Chuckle score: 0/5
Nope, didn't feel this one at all

Anyone else building weird little things for lawyers? Share in the comments!

#LegalTech #LawyerHumor #AttorneyLife
